headline: Nebius stock surges 17% as Nvidia discloses significant stake in neocloud
detail: This is positive news for the chip and AI sector. Nvidia's investment signals confidence in the 'neocloud' space, which is part of the broader tech infrastructure. This could provide a tailwind for your tech/chip holdings.
rec: Consider a new buy on NVDA (scanner entry 205.64-205.28, stop 204.47) given this positive sector news and its scanner setup.

headline: U.S. could sanction China over AI model 'theft'
detail: This is a significant risk for your tech and chip heavy portfolio. Sanctions against China over AI could disrupt supply chains and market access, increasing geopolitical tensions and impacting your concentrated holdings.
rec: No immediate trade, but this warrants close monitoring. Be prepared to trim or tighten stops on your tech/chip holdings if tensions escalate, given your margin exposure.
